## Experience impact

- Experience IDs changed:
- States and roles affected:
- Breakpoints reviewed: mobile / tablet / desktop / wide
- Primary task still clear:

## Evidence

- Candidate screenshots:
- Baseline or approved visual-diff reference:
- Keyboard/focus result:
- Automated accessibility result:
- Console/runtime result:
- Signal Review record or finding IDs:

## Design-system impact

- Canonical components/tokens used:
- New pattern proposed (if any):
- Intentional exception ID and expiry (if any):

## Gate

- [ ] Registry validation passes and no experience is unregistered.
- [ ] Material changes have deterministic fixtures, screenshots, and accessibility evidence.
- [ ] No release-blocking finding remains unresolved.
- [ ] Subjective visual approval is recorded when hierarchy, brand, or composition changed.
